tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Raindrops Keep Fallin On My Head

performance.name: Live at Folsom State Prison, Folsom, CA - January 1968

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Dark clouds are blowin in the wind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
He’s crossing your mind again[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]
You got that sad, sad feeling[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
From a broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Feeling so close to the end[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
Let me love you tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
There’s a million stars in the sky[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Let me love you tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb/G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
I’ll make everything all right[/tab]

[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch] (Verse)
e|-------------|-------|
B|-------------|-------|
G|-----3-3---3-|-3-----|
D|-3-5-----5---|-------|
A|-------------|-------|
E|-------------|-------|[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
When you find out how good love can be[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
You’re so lost when it sets you free[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
They say once in your life[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Gm[/ch]
You find someone’s that right[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
Someone who loves you like me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Let me love you tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
There’s a million stars in the sky[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
Let me love you tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb/G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
I’ll make everything all right[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]C7[/ch]
When the moon has forgotten, what the night’s about[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C7[/ch]       [ch]F7[/ch]
And the stars can’t work, their blaze is out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
Hold me, tighter than tight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C7[/ch]                    [ch]Eb/G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
When the daylight comes, it’ll be all right[/tab]

[Sax Solo]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
[ch]D7[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] x2   [ch]C7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
